checks.detail: No Python/Node/Rust dependency manifests; only apt packages and an unpinned cmark git clone.
Task is pure C with only stdlib Python in tests; no pip/uv usage.
task.toml has no docker_image field (acceptable during development; required before final delivery).

notes: cmark is cloned with --depth 1 from main without a pinned tag/commit; pin a specific release before final delivery for reproducibility.
Set docker_image in task.toml before final delivery.
